info.name: Laravel JWT Recruitment API
info.description: Ready-to-import Postman Collection v2.1 for the Laravel JWT Recruitment API. Covers Auth, Profil (Candidat), Offres, Candidatures & Statut, and Admin endpoints with positive and negative-path tests.

exec: pm.test('Response has errors', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('errors'); });
pm.test('User object returned', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('id'); });
pm.test('Response is array or paginated', function () { var json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.satisfy(function(r) { return Array.isArray(r) || (r.data && Array.isArray(r.data)); }); });
